titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Nadr Ibn Suwayd
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Nadr Ibn Suwayd

segments: ه عن النضر بن سويد فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن محمّد بن عيسى بن عبيد، عن النضر بن سويد.
arabic.text: ه عن النضر بن سويد فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن محمّد بن عيسى بن عبيد، عن النضر بن سويد.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Nadr ibn Suwayd has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar, from Muhammad ibn Isa ibn Ubayd, from Al-Nadr ibn Suwayd.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Nadr ibn Suwayd has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar, from Muhammad ibn Isa ibn Ubayd, from Al-Nadr ibn Suwayd.
